"'''Rough and Tundra'''" was a web enhancement published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] on [[March 25]], [[2004]] for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
Two legendary [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]—[[Clabburn the Younger]] and [[Salmakk]]—are back plying their trade on the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Interested parties hire a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to locate the pirates.

It is eventually revealed that the pirates were inspired by [[Figg Excavations/Legends|FiggEx]] in order to come in and increase their holdings.

==Continuity==
[[Salmakk]] first appeared in the comic [[Star Wars 3-D 2|''Star Wars 3-D'' 2]].

The adventure is open-ended, with the location of the pirates and their fate up to the players.
